meta.title.string: Embed Fixer | Discord bot for fixing social media embeds

meta.description.string: Embed Fixer intercepts broken social links and reposts them through webhooks so embeds render correctly inside Discord. Supports all the popular platforms, trusted by 1200+ servers, and open source for self-hosting.

hero.heading.string: The link looked broken. The conversation shouldn’t.

hero.tagline.string: Embed Fixer intercepts broken social links and reposts them through webhooks so embeds render correctly inside Discord.

hero.relay.actionValue.string: Delete + resend through webhook with your avatar and username

hero.relay.resultValue.string: Playable media, full previews, readable content

problem.heading.string: Discord strips the point out of shared posts.

problem.items.0.string: Twitter/X previews fail or load partially.

problem.items.1.string: Pixiv and Instagram often hide core media.

problem.items.2.string: TikTok and Reddit links lose playable videos.

problem.items.3.string: Broken link forces users to leave Discord.

features.heading.string: Features that are well-thoughtout and actually useful.

features.items.0.string: Automatic fixing through webhook reposting with your username + avatar.

features.items.1.string: Manual fixings with /fix in DMs and unsupported servers.

features.items.2.string: Media extraction for supported links in a gallery-like view.

features.items.3.string: Numerous settings to customize behavior and tailor to your server’s needs.

platforms.heading.string: From mainstream to niche, if the embed is broken, we’ll fix it.

customization.heading.string: Tune almost every behavior to fit your server.

customization.body.string: The most powerful part about Embed Fixer is that almost every behavior can be customized or toggled to your liking, including niche features shaped by real community needs.

customization.resetNote.string: All settings are unique to each server. Use /reset to restore default values.

customization.settings.0.description.string: Change the language used by the bot.

customization.settings.1.description.string: Disable embed fixes for specific websites.

customization.settings.2.description.string: Extract images/videos from Twitter/X or Pixiv links in selected channels.

customization.settings.3.description.string: Channels here will not receive embed fixes.

customization.settings.4.description.string: Only selected channels receive embed fixes, and this overrides blacklist rules.

customization.settings.5.description.string: Toggle pinging the original author when replying via webhook.

customization.settings.6.label.string: Disable Automatic Spoilering in NSFW Channels

customization.settings.6.description.string: Skip automatic spoiler tags for extracted media in selected NSFW channels.

customization.settings.7.description.string: Add reactions so original authors can delete webhook messages.

customization.settings.8.description.string: Show post text content in selected channels when media extraction is enabled.

customization.settings.9.description.string: Choose which emoji is used for delete-by-reaction.

customization.settings.10.description.string: Choose the embed fix service used for different websites.

customization.settings.11.description.string: Choose whether links sent by other bots should also be fixed.

customization.settings.12.description.string: Send fixed embeds and extracted media to a target channel instead of the source channel.

customization.settings.13.description.string: Only users with selected roles get embed fixes. Leave empty to disable.

customization.settings.14.description.string: Show or hide a button linking to the original post.

customization.settings.15.label.string: Toggle Deleting Original Messages in Threads

customization.settings.15.description.string: Delete original thread messages after sending fixed embeds through supported flow.

customization.settings.16.description.string: Reply to the original message with the fixed embed instead of deleting and resending.

hosting.heading.string: Care about privacy? Open source comes to the rescue.

hosting.body.string: Run Embed Fixer on your own machine if you want maximum control over your data and configuration.

closing.heading.string: If your server shares links, this belongs in it.

closing.body.string: Stop leaving Discord for broken embeds. Add Embed Fixer and keep every conversation intact.

footer.copyright.string: Copyright © 2026 Seria Ati. All rights reserved.
